title: page one
content:
You made it past the birds and the pillars — that part was just to make you earn it.

This is the real letter. It will grow every time I add a page, so come back and flip through it whenever you like.
replyPrompt: what are you thinking right now?

title: page two
caption: (swap this file for a real photo — see the README)

title: page three
content: Every new page just gets appended to pages.json. No rebuilding, no redeploying the whole site — just write, save, push.
